narrative.narrative: Fear has a stranglehold on the market as the Fear & Greed Index sinks to 29, mirroring the emotional washout seen in August 2024. Yet beneath the surface, stablecoin expansion and a deeply undervalued MVRV Z-Score are quietly building the same foundation that launched the last relief rally. The crowd is panicking while smart money appears to be reloading.
narrative.headline: Panic Below The Surface: The August Blueprint Repeats

next_move.outlook: The narrative arc suggests accumulation in the anxiety phase will soon give way to a sharp mean-reversion rally, punishing late shorts.

consensus.key_reasoning: The analyst's Anxiety phase (score 29) is the legally anchored position, and while the narrative writer's bullish accumulation thesis is compelling, the analyst's higher trust weight and caution about divergent ETF flows and VIX spikes justify a defensive posture. Sideways churn into Complacency is the most probable path unless confirmation signals emerge.
